samples.xml_description:
<module id="JC_counter">
    <description>Implement a 64-bit Johnson counter (torsional ring counter), and the state of the similar 4-bit Johnson counter example is as follows: 0000, 1000, 1100, 1110, 1111, 0111, 0011, 0001, 0000.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <output id="Q" width_description="[63:0]">Current count value.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Reset to 0. Increment if Q[0]=0, decrement if Q[0]=1.</implementation>
</module>
